response: - the spirit of the guru is present in every being, and through the gene of the language, the spirit of the guru can be felt in the heart of the devotee. the visit of the guru brings about a transformation, where the devotee becomes a part of the spirit of the guru, and the language of the guru is heard in the heart of the devotee. *** the language of the guru is a gift, and through the visit of the guru, the devotee can understand the spirit of the guru. the gene of the language is passed on through the visit of the guru, and the spirit of the guru is felt in the heart of the devotee.
